top_signals.title: Trump claims Iran shot down US helicopter and vows to ‘respond’
top_signals.summary: US president said Iranians downed Apache aircraft over Strait of Hormuz amid fragile ceasefire
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FedEx pilots approve new contract, ending protracted bargaining
top_signals.summary:
FedEx pilots have finally approved a collective bargaining agreement after years of labor unrest.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary: Stabilising the finances of another country is a foreign policy decision as well as an economic one
